name: UBA : Browsed to Social Networking Website
notes: Detects when users is browsing to websites categorized as Social Networking.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%social networking%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%chat%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%blog%' or "Web Category" ilike '%dating%' or "Web Category" ilike '%personal%' or "Web Category" in (79, 117, 204, 215, 1500, 1505, 1506, 1507, 1508, 1509, 1510, 1511, 1512, 1513, 1514, 1516, 1517, 1518, 1519, 1520, 1521, 1523, 1524, 1525, 1526, 1528, 1529, 1530, 1531) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Social Networking Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

AND when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%social networking%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%chat%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%blog%' or "Web Category" ilike '%dating%' or "Web Category" ilike '%personal%' or "Web Category" in (79, 117, 204, 215, 1500, 1505, 1506, 1507, 1508, 1509, 1510, 1511, 1512, 1513, 1514, 1516, 1517, 1518, 1519, 1520, 1521, 1523, 1524, 1525, 1526, 1528, 1529, 1530, 1531) AQL filter query
